features.title: Install Bibles, commentaries & dictionaries from CrossWire
features.description: A new CrossWire Catalog in the Content Manager downloads and installs SWORD modules — Bibles, commentaries, and dictionaries — directly in the app.

features.title: Automatic update checks
features.description: On desktop, the app now lets you know when a newer version is available.

features.title: Rebuild prompt for improved verse search
features.description: Verse search indexing was improved; the What's New screen now offers a one-tap rebuild so already-installed Bibles return complete results.

features.title: Fixed a crash when deleting or installing a version
features.description: Removing or adding a Bible no longer crashes the reader.

features.title: Reliability fixes
features.description: Resolved dialog memory leaks, surfaced previously-silent network and download errors, and hardened reader state recovery.

features.title: Global Version Tracking
